---
name: Where is my JOSS submission?
about: Pre-review is a manual process that may take up to 4 weeks
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

If you'd like to open an issue to ask whether your submission was received,
please wait at least four weeks before doing so.
The creation of the pre-review issue is a manual step and is handled by different people on different tracks.
Your submission has almost certainly been received.
